title: platostoma tectum
intro: Platostoma tectum, also known as African Blue Basil or Wild Basil, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of compounds such as platostatic acid and tectumin. Consuming Platostoma tectum has been associated with various health benefits, including reduced inflammation and oxidative stress, improved digestion, and enhanced immune function. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Platostoma tectum can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
